gumroadDiscovery.label: Gumroad discovery

controlRuntime.label: Control runtime

controlRuntime.nextMove: Keep the control-layer runtime on watch only; only intervene again if stderr refills, launchctl last exit code drifts above 0, publish lines stop advancing, or the published preview drifts from local state.
controlRuntime.constraint: Treat runtime health as infrastructure truth; do not count it as storefront progress.
